items.summary:
忘卻篇劇情不錯 但遊戲卡牌很無聊還超級貴
卡牌角色上看抽同一隻八次才有完整卡牌功能
沒抽上去 不好意思 廢牌一個喔
官方送的資源相當少 大部分都是常駐抽
但關鍵卡牌都在限定角色裡
融災(深淵)已經膨脹到新入玩家無法遊玩
但她很多資源又在放在高難裡
導致你養成角色週期更慢 
不建議無氪和最近剛入坑玩家遊玩
這遊戲的攻略很少 沒多少玩家 玩家都在擺爛了
配隊也非常侷限 幾乎都是官方幫你綁定好的隊伍

items.title:
[正面] 很尷尬，美術與劇情都非常好，但是真的課金要素太兇猛了。

通常一隻新角限定時間不到一個月，而一單32...
items.summary:
很尷尬，美術與劇情都非常好，但是真的課金要素太兇猛了。

通常一隻新角限定時間不到一個月，而一單3290台幣(約62抽)，同一隻角色你就得抽"16隻"，保底三十抽有SSR，如果真的衰透，你要90抽才能必定保底中角，這只是抽角色喔

而一隻角色從抽到後再真正意義上弄到完美，你會需要  遊戲特色:啟靈(專屬被動)抽同角色x16隻、技能(6招都得生6次，道具你得花錢曲線取得)、天賦(另一種被動，獨有要12次，共通有的10次，也得花錢曲線取得)、升格(擴充升級格，同樣要花錢曲線取得)。

而編隊4隻，你至少得重複上述動作4次，才真正完整一隊伍的角色。

而這遊戲還有另一個重點課金要素:命輪(附屬卡)
跟角色啟靈一樣都得抽16張才能升級到最高，慶幸的是沒有角色的其他需要升級的東西。
而隊伍的每隻角色可以裝2張，一共八張。

由此可知，那花費量將會非常驚人，請各位要玩的，三思呀。

但我是極推劇情的，真的很棒。

日本語ボイスは比較的まともなのに表記がひどい
そのせいでストーリーには入っていきづらいし、ゲームシステムやギミックの理解も難しくなっている
雰囲気は良さげなので改善されたらまた触るかも

items.title: [正面] While the gameplay itself is solid, Morimens falls...
items.summary:
While the gameplay itself is solid, Morimens falls short in several key areas. One major issue is the story. Despite the exceptional setting—a dark, dystopian fantasy world—the narrative delivery is lacking. A game shouldn’t rely solely on text to tell its story. Players need to feel involved through gameplay, animations, voice acting, or even environmental storytelling using items and symbols, as seen in other titles that manage to convey depth without traditional cutscenes.

Another weak point is the lack of purpose. There’s no clear motivation to keep playing, and the story doesn’t provide enough drive. Instead of focusing on meaningful progression, the developers seem to have prioritized the gacha mechanics, flooding the game with multiple currencies, battle passes, and purchasable upgrades. Many of these battle passes offer little to no value, making the experience feel cluttered and monetization-heavy.

The concept of blending Slay the Spire-style gameplay with gacha elements is intriguing, but unfortunately, the execution doesn’t live up to the potential.

items.title: [正面] recomendable para quien le guste este estilo de ju...
items.summary:
recomendable para quien le guste este estilo de juegos, con hermosa y bien cuidada estética, multitud de opciones entre subir y gestionar personajes y objetos, sistema pvp entre jugadores, combate por turnos mediante sistema de cartas y más...
sólo le falla un poco la traducción, pero también hay que pensar no se puede pedir peras al olmo. Los asiáticos a duras penas dominan el inglés, menos todavía cualquier otro idioma fuera de su zona. Aún así, al ser un copiar y pegar del traductor google, con alguna "palabra loca", es del todo entendible.
además gratuito y no se requiere ingresar para avanzar, si bien alguna propina para el mantenimiento del juego puede caer.
recomendado 100%
...............................
Recommended for anyone who likes this style of game, with a beautiful and well-curated aesthetic, a multitude of options to level up and manage characters and items, a PVP system between players, turn-based combat using a card system, and more...
The only thing that's slightly lacking in translation, but you also have to keep in mind that you can't get anything from an elm tree. Asians barely have a command of English, let alone any other language outside their own region. Still, being a copy and paste from Google Translate, with a few "crazy words," it's completely understandable.
It's also free and no login is required to progress, although a tip for game maintenance may be incurred.
100% recommended.

items.title: [正面] I have played for about a month now both on PC and...
items.summary:
I have played for about a month now both on PC and mobile and really recommend it. I'm a big fan of eldritch horrors / HPL and I'm honestly excited to see what other characters and creatures they will implement over time. The audio design and visuals of this game are STUNNING and the devs are hardworking and super sweet, taking their time to listen to the community to improve things and providing information and materials like artworks and whatnot. The gacha is in my opinion very fair and the stories are just heartbreaking (+ I'm the biggest Uvhash simp imma be honest)

This game legit became my favorite mobage along with Arknights and I hope more people find and enjoy this game so it can continue to grow and get more popular, the devs really deserve it for their hard work ❤️

Feel free to use my invitation code 9Y6LWIXPG2 !!
